steps.t: Góda has instructed you to make a patrol of the Entwash Vale to determine the strength of the Enemy. You should patrol the first point.
Góda has instructed you to make a patrol of the Entwash Vale to determine the strength of the Enemy. You should patrol the second point.
Góda has instructed you to make a patrol of the Entwash Vale to determine the strength of the Enemy. You should patrol the third point.
Góda has instructed you to make a patrol of the Entwash Vale to determine the strength of the Enemy. You should patrol the fourth point.
Góda has instructed you to make a patrol of the Entwash Vale to determine the strength of the Enemy. You should patrol the final point.
Lady Góda is in the Mead Hall of Eaworth, in the Entwash Vale. You should return to Lady Góda with news of your success.
